a:r.a:t: Maps SDK, Directions API, Distance Matrix

Our EV charging booking platform is grounded in proven real-world systems — drawing from GPS-based location detection, live mobility tracking, and cloud-native infrastructure to deliver a seamless, intelligent charging experience.
an app using mobile GPS to detect real-time location, arrival, and departure without internet, working reliably in low-connectivity environments.
Detect user arrival at charging station via GPS
Auto check-in when user reaches the location
Based on real-world GPS tracking principles
